column1: Tells %s %s you are interested in hiring, and sends him to the pool, hiring the hero if you have the %dBC, and to wait 20 turns if you do not.

column1: That is an outpost. You cannot send settlers to an outpost.\n
column2: 那是一座前哨站,無法向前哨站派遣移民。\n

column1: That planet may not be attacked.
The Defending Player has a telepathic officer here who thwarts your attempt to seize the colony.
column2: 防守方在此駐有一名心靈感應軍官,挫敗了你奪取殖民地的企圖。

column2: 防守方本身也是心靈感應種族,以精神力嘲弄你奪取殖民地的企圖。

column1: The source colony is blockaded, and cannot send settlers.\n

column1: There may not be room for this unit here when it is built. Continue?

column1: These colonists will be unavailable for %d turns, while in transit, are you sure?

column1: This colonist is a native, natives can only farm or mine.
column2: 這名殖民者是原住民,原住民只能從事農耕或採礦。

column1: This colonist is a Rebel, Rebels will not move to another job

column1: This ship has a leader, Send %s to the officer pool first?

column1: This ship is being refitted, removing it from the queue will delete it forever, losing all of the original value of the ship. Delete the ship?

column1: This ship is too large to be built here.
column2: 這艘星艦體型過大,無法在此建造。
已建造的星艦數量過多

column1: Will you pay me %dbc to feast elsewhere %s, if you refuse, I shall pillage your puny subjects in the %s system!

column1: You already have enough colony bases for every planet in system
column2: 此星系內每顆行星都已有足夠的殖民基地
你根本不具備心靈感應能力!

column1: You cannot afford this increase in production. You are short by %d BC.

column2: 人造行星只能建造在小行星帶或氣態巨行星上

column1: You cannot buy Housing or Trade Goods, as they are settings, not specific items.
column2: 你無法購買住房或貿易商品,因為它們屬於整體設定,而非個別項目。

column2: 此星系遭到封鎖時無法購買。

column1: You cannot change this once you have bought it
column2: 一旦購買後便無法更改

column1: You cannot mind control this colony
column2: 你無法對這座殖民地進行精神控制

column1: You cannot refit cruiser or larger ships at a star with no star base (or better).
column2: 沒有星際基地(或更高等級設施)的星系無法改裝巡洋艦以上的星艦。
你無法改裝洛克納爾的座艦。

column1: You cannot send the last unit of population from a colony.\n
column2: 你無法將殖民地最後一名人口遷出。\n

column2: 你無法花費 BC 讓此項目在一回合內完成得更快。

column1: You find %s, who joins you out of gratitude for being rescued.

column2: 你發現了 %s,他原本願意因獲救而加入,但你已沒有空間容納他

column1: You have already bought this product.
You have no product selected to buy.
column2: 你尚未選擇要購買的產品。

column2: 你沒有巡洋艦,而奪取殖民地需要巡洋艦。

column1: You have reached the maximum number of settlers which can be enroute at any given time.\n
column2: 你派出的移民數量已達同時在途的上限。\n

column1: You may not attack a fleet in space if the player has a colony in this system. You must attack the fleet at the colony.
column2: 若對方在此星系擁有殖民地,你不能在太空中攻擊其艦隊,必須在殖民地處進行攻擊。

column1: You may not attack a planet which has no colony
column2: 你不能攻擊沒有殖民地的行星

column1: You may not attack you own colony
column2: 你不能攻擊自己的殖民地

column1: You may not attack your own colony
column2: 你不能攻擊自己的殖民地

column1: You may not attack your own fleet. Hit the Close button if you want no combat at the star
column2: 你不能攻擊自己的艦隊。若不想在此星系開戰,請點選關閉按鈕

column1: Allows you to choose not to begin combat at this time.
column2: 讓你選擇此時不開始戰鬥。

column1: Allows you to begin dropping troops in an effort to conquer the colony.
column2: 讓你開始空投部隊,試圖征服該殖民地。

column1: Allows you to begin the bombardment phase of your attack.
column2: 讓你開始進行攻擊的轟炸階段。

column1: Use your stellar converter like God intended, to repeatedly pummel the planet until only an asteroid field remains to mark the dead.
column2: 如神所願地使用你的恆星轉換器,反覆轟擊這顆行星,直到只剩一片小行星帶為死者留下印記。

column1: Prove your superiority over the inferior race below by psychically overwhelming the colony's defences.
column2: 以精神力壓制殖民地的防禦,向下方的劣等種族證明你的優越。

column1: Drop all your bombs in one final attack.\n\n 'Nuke 'em from orbit, it's the only way to be sure..'
column2: 在最後一擊中投下你所有的炸彈。\n\n「從軌道上把他們炸了,這才是唯一保險的辦法……」

column1: Allows you to pause bombing at any time you choose, either to begin again, or to go on to another phase of combat.
column2: 讓你可以隨時暫停轟炸,之後再繼續轟炸,或進入戰鬥的其他階段。

column1: Begin dropping bombs one at a time now, Allowing for a cease fire at any time.
column2: 現在開始逐一投下炸彈,並可隨時停火。

column1: SAVE%d.GAM is invalid! Try another save slot or start a NEW game
column2: SAVE%d.GAM 檔案無效!請嘗試其他存檔欄位,或開始新遊戲

column1: Custom refit this ship on the design screen
column2: 在設計畫面中自訂改裝這艘星艦

column1: This design is not the same size as the ship you are refitting
column2: 此設計圖的尺寸與你正在改裝的星艦不同

column1: Clicking here refits the %s ship with the %s design
column2: 點選這裡會將 %s 依 %s 設計圖進行改裝

column1: Clicking here sends you to the design screen to cutsom refit this ship.
column2: 點選這裡會前往設計畫面,自訂改裝這艘星艦。

column1: This popup allows you to quickly refit ships by upgrading them into an existing design as opposed to designing them by hand each time
column2: 此彈出視窗讓你能將星艦快速升級為現有設計圖,而不必每次手動設計

column1: Allows you to cancel and not refit the ship
column2: 讓你取消操作,不進行改裝
